questions.question_text: Answer the following questions. Write short note on: a What encompasses a Built Environment? 2.5 b Why is Building orientation and form important? 2.5 c What is Urban Heat Island effect? 2.5 d Name one vernacular façade insulating technique? 2.5 e Define HVAC in term and function? 2.5 f What is PCM integrated glazing? 2.5 g What is a Thermosiphon Heater? 2.5 h What is a roof pond system? 2.5
Explain Climatic classification of Koppen and Candolle with examples. 10
Describe how window positioning in cross ventilation acts like a passive cooling system? 10
Describe with illustrations the working of any one roof system for insulation and cooling. 10
Describe Mahoney’s tables and how users can define parameters of building design from it? 10
How does a double skin green façade work? Illustrate. 10
How do cavity walls work and what are their limitations? 10
What are the advantages of a Radiant cooling system? 10
Describe any passive design strategy in Cold Climate. 10
